title: Local LLM Orchestrator
description: A local deployment orchestrator using Ollama to manage multiple large language models, interconnected securely via Tailscale across distributed edge devices.

title: Hardware Sensor Network
description: IoT monitoring system utilizing Arduino and ESP8266 devices to gather environmental data, continuously synced to a central Zabbix server for real-time alerting.

title: Full-Stack System Dashboard
description: A centralized dashboard providing a high-level view of infrastructure health, integrating telemetry from AI nodes and IoT devices into a unified React interface.
